_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Stablecoin reserves ballooning alongside extreme bearish sentiment mirrors the August 2024 setup where early recovery occurred without crowd trust, suggesting a drift into Disbelief as sidelined capital deploys.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial — both point toward Disbelief as the next phase, but Analyst frames it as a flat/uncertain drift while Narrative implies violent upside; the direction split is HOLD vs UP
